description: The ``Set User Scale`` node changes the user scale with the provided inputs. While the user is scaling and the user is in the middle of a scale animation, the user cannot be scaled again until the animation has finished.

fields.* ([[Impulses|AsyncCall]]): Calls from an impulse to start changing the user's scale.
fields.Scale: The target scale to aim for.
fields.AnimationTime: How long this scaling should take.
fields.OnScaleChangeStart: Fires when the scaling has started.
fields.OnAnimationFinished: Fires when the scaling animation has finished scaling the user.
